result:
All done. Here's a summary of what was created and modified:

## New files (extension)

- **`extensions/mistral-portal-auth/package.json`** тАФ Package metadata, version `2026.3.2`
- **`extensions/mistral-portal-auth/openclaw.plugin.json`** тАФ Plugin manifest with `mistral-portal` provider, config schema for `apiKey` and `baseUrl`
- **`extensions/mistral-portal-auth/index.ts`** тАФ Main plugin entry point; registers `mistral-portal` provider with `api_key` auth kind. Prompts for API key and base URL, validates the key against Mistral's `/models` endpoint, configures three models (Mistral Large, Mistral Medium, Codestral)
- **`extensions/mistral-portal-auth/validate.ts`** тАФ API key validation via `GET /models` with Bearer auth
- **`extensions/mistral-portal-auth/index.test.ts`** тАФ 9 unit tests covering plugin registration, auth run with valid/invalid keys, and `normalizeBaseUrl` edge cases
- **`extensions/mistral-portal-auth/README.md`** тАФ Usage docs

## New files (core wiring)

- **`src/commands/auth-choice.apply.mistral-portal.ts`** тАФ Auth choice handler delegating to `applyAuthChoicePluginProvider`

## Modified files

- **`src/commands/onboard-types.ts`** тАФ Added `"mistral-portal"` to `AuthChoice` union
- **`src/commands/auth-choice-options.ts`** тАФ Added `mistral-portal` to the `mistral` group and to `BASE_AUTH_CHOICE_OPTIONS`
- **`src/commands/auth-choice.preferred-provider.ts`** тАФ Added `"mistral-portal": "mistral-portal"` mapping
- **`src/commands/auth-choice.apply.ts`** тАФ Imported and wired `applyAuthChoiceMistralPortal` into the handler chain
- **`src/commands/auth-choice-options.test.ts`** тАФ Added `"mistral-portal"` to expected auth choices
- **`src/commands/auth-choice.test.ts`** тАФ Added `mistral-portal` preferred-provider test case
- **`.github/labeler.yml`** тАФ Added `extensions: mistral-portal-auth` label rule
